query:
OK... I want to pick up issue 436 and begin working this as a bugfix.  Read comments... both issues should be part of our fix scope: INITIAL_CATEGORIES in categories.rs pub(crate),
   remove the duplicate from config.rs, and      
  update config.rs to reference                
  categories::INITIAL_CATEGORIES instead of
  maintaining its own copy. After that, test_defa
  ult_config_categories_match_initial_categories
  in main_tests.rs becomes a compile-time
  guarantee rather than a runtime cross-check of
  two manually-synced constants — which is
  strictly better.

entries.title: Category retirement in INITIAL_CATEGORIES requires updates in 4 independent locations
KnowledgeConfig parallel list defaults collide in validate_config test fixtures — zero ALL parallel lists together
Splitting Default impl from serde default creates silent test failures — spec must enumerate affected tests
Config Default impl with non-empty value causes literal duplication across test infrastructure
KnowledgeConfig parallel list fields follow the boosted_categories structural pattern
